section.title: PerformanceTracker Class Reference

listitem.para: Start a new performance measurement with the given name.
Stop the performance measurement with the given name.
Print the stats for all measurements.

section.section:

clear() clearPerformanceTracker PerformanceTrackerclear

Clear all performance measurements.
